meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no design skills (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no design skills. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Pricing to Solve No Design Skills
content.seo_description: Learn how to build high-converting SaaS pricing pages without design skills. A beginner case study using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Stop struggling with CSS frameworks. By leveraging Antigravity to generate clean, semantic UI components and Claude Code to handle the logic, you can deploy professional SaaS pricing tables in minutes. This workflow eliminates the need for design skills, allowing you to focus on shipping revenue-generating features for your clients.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the cursor blinking with rhythmic indifference. Your client needs a high-converting SaaS pricing page by Friday, but your design skills are, at best, 'functional.' The pressure is mounting—every hour spent tweaking hex codes is an hour stolen from your bottom line.

But what if you didn't need to be a designer to build world-class interfaces? By treating design as a system of constraints rather than an art form, you can automate the aesthetic layer entirely. Today, we’re bridging the gap between raw code and polished product, using AI-driven tools to ship premium pricing tiers that convert.

steps.title: Define the Pricing Architecture
steps.description: Before touching code, map out your tiers. Focus on a 3-tier structure (Starter, Pro, Enterprise) to anchor user expectations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a semantic HTML/Tailwind structure for a 3-tier SaaS pricing page. Include hover states for cards and a toggle for annual/monthly billing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create pricing-model.ts with interfaces for plans, features, and pricing logic'

steps.title: Component Scaffold with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the visual layout, ensuring the component is mobile-responsive and accessible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive React pricing component using Lucide icons for feature checkmarks and a high-contrast 'Most Popular' badge for the Pro tier.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'integrate the generated component into the pricing page route'

steps.title: Inject State Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to handle the toggle state between monthly and annual billing to ensure calculations are accurate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the state management logic for a monthly/annual toggle that updates the price display dynamically.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add state logic to pricing component to handle annual discount calculations'

steps.title: Optimize for Conversion
steps.description: Add psychological triggers like 'Most Popular' highlights and clear call-to-action buttons.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Update the pricing table to include a 'Most Popular' ribbon and ensure all CTA buttons have distinct hover and active states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'add visual emphasis to the Enterprise tier and ensure all CTAs have clear click tracking placeholders'

steps.title: Final Quality Assurance
steps.description: Test the responsiveness and accessibility to ensure the page works perfectly on all devices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current pricing page code and suggest improvements for screen reader accessibility and contrast ratios.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'run accessibility audit on the pricing page and fix any identified issues'

pro_tips: Always anchor your pricing with a 'Pro' tier that is 2.5x the price of your starter tier to drive higher average revenue.
Use CSS clamp() for typography to ensure headlines scale perfectly across mobile and desktop without manual media queries.
Implement 'invisible' performance wins by lazy-loading the pricing component until the user scrolls into the viewport.
Never hardcode prices; use a central configuration file so you can update client pricing in seconds without touching the UI.
Add a 'Contact Us' button to the Enterprise tier to capture high-intent leads that don't fit your standard pricing model.
content.next_steps: Once the pricing page is live, implement a simple analytics event on the 'Buy' button to track your conversion rate and iterate based on real user data.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start shipping like a pro. With Antigravity and Claude Code, you have the leverage to dominate your freelance market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
